channel.title: Audio on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Audio on Arrans github.io

item.title: huggingface/transformers
item.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

item.title: jeanslack/FFcuesplitter
item.description: FFmpeg based audio splitter for CDDA images associated with .cue files

item.title: juce-framework/JUCE
item.description: JUCE is an open-source cross-platform C++ application framework for desktop and mobile applications, including VST, VST3, AU, AUv3, LV2 and AAX audio plug-ins.

item.title: spotify/basic-pitch
item.description: A lightweight yet powerful audio-to-MIDI converter with pitch bend detection

item.title: bluefireteam/audioplayers
item.description: A Flutter package to play multiple audio files simultaneously (Android/iOS/web/Linux/Windows/macOS)

item.title: suitux/Tagr
item.description: Self-hosted web app for browsing, playing, and editing music file metadata. Features a three-panel UI to navigate your library, listen to tracks, and write tag changes directly back to audio files. Built with Next.js, React, Prisma + SQLite, and node-taglib-sharp.

item.title: ebitengine/oto
item.description: ♪ A low-level library to play sound on multiple platforms ♪

item.title: FrancescoCeruti/linux-show-player
item.description: Linux Show Player - Cue player designed for stage productions

item.title: dotnet/Silk.NET
item.description: The high-speed OpenGL, OpenCL, OpenAL, OpenXR, GLFW, SDL, Vulkan, Assimp, WebGPU, and DirectX bindings library your mother warned you about.

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.
